title: Why You're Still Better Than AI at Editing Documents - CS50 Tech Talk
summary: AI currently struggles to reliably edit Word documents while preserving structural integrity, unlike humans. Document reliability requires treating files as software with internal logic rather than plain text. Current AI cannot match human consistency in document editing at scale without perfect trustworthiness.
